---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# Get in touch
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: contact-card
## Email

::: email-block
[connorconkeymorrison\@gmail.com](mailto:connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com){.email-address}
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyEmail(this)">Copy address</button>
<a href="mailto:connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com" class="copy-btn">Open in email</a>
:::

For research, teaching, clinical, or professional inquiries, email is the best point of contact. I aim to respond within a few business days.

---

```{=html}
<style>
.ccm-type-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin: 1.25rem 0 1.5rem 0;
}
.ccm-type-btn {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #5c5c5c;
  background: #f8f7f5;
  border: 1px solid #e4e1da;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.85rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.18s, color 0.18s, border-color 0.18s;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}
.ccm-type-btn:hover {
  border-color: #1a2e4a;
  color: #1a2e4a;
}
.ccm-type-btn.active {
  background: #1a2e4a;
  color: #fff;
  border-color: #1a2e4a;
}
.ccm-form-group { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }
.ccm-label {
  display: block;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a2e4a;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}
.ccm-input {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.65rem 0.9rem;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #1a1a1a;
  background: #f8f7f5;
  border: 1px solid #e4e1da;
  border-radius: 8px;
  outline: none;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  transition: border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s;
}
.ccm-input:focus {
  border-color: #1a2e4a;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26,46,74,0.08);
  background: #fff;
}
.ccm-textarea { min-height: 130px; resize: vertical; line-height: 1.65; }
.ccm-footer-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
}
.ccm-submit {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.6rem 1.4rem;
  background: #1a2e4a;
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  border: 2px solid #1a2e4a;
  border-radius: 999px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.18s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,46,74,0.18);
}
.ccm-submit:hover {
  background: #2a4268;
  border-color: #2a4268;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(26,46,74,0.28);
}
.ccm-submit:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }
.ccm-clear {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #5c5c5c;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0;
  transition: color 0.18s;
}
.ccm-clear:hover { color: #1a2e4a; }
.ccm-status {
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: 1.2em;
}
.ccm-status.success { color: #2d7a4f; }
.ccm-status.error   { color: #c0392b; }
</style>

<div class="ccm-type-row">
  <button class="ccm-type-btn" onclick="setType('Research / collaboration')">Research & collaboration</button>
  <button class="ccm-type-btn" onclick="setType('Teaching / supervision')">Teaching & supervision</button>
  <button class="ccm-type-btn" onclick="setType('Clinical / professional')">Clinical & professional</button>
  <button class="ccm-type-btn" onclick="setType('General')">General</button>
</div>

<form id="contact-form" onsubmit="handleSubmit(event)">
  <input type="hidden" name="access_key" value="03b4348e-774c-4e7b-9300-f9f602cecc75">
  <input type="hidden" id="ccm-subject" name="subject" value="Message from connorconkeymorrison.com">
  <div class="ccm-form-group">
    <label class="ccm-label" for="name">Name</label>
    <input type="text" id="name" name="name" class="ccm-input" placeholder="Your name" required>
  </div>
  <div class="ccm-form-group">
    <label class="ccm-label" for="email">Email</label>
    <input type="email" id="email" name="email" class="ccm-input" placeholder="your@email.com" required>
  </div>
  <div class="ccm-form-group">
    <label class="ccm-label" for="message">Message</label>
    <textarea id="message" name="message" class="ccm-input ccm-textarea" placeholder="Your message..." required></textarea>
  </div>
  <div class="ccm-footer-row">
    <button type="submit" class="ccm-submit" id="submit-btn">Send message</button>
    <button type="button" class="ccm-clear" onclick="clearForm()">Clear</button>
  </div>
  <p id="ccm-status" class="ccm-status"></p>
</form>

<script>
const templates = {
  'Research / collaboration': {
    subject: 'Research enquiry — connorconkeymorrison.com',
    placeholder: "Hi Connor,\n\nI'm reaching out regarding a potential research collaboration or enquiry...",
  },
  'Teaching / supervision': {
    subject: 'Teaching enquiry — connorconkeymorrison.com',
    placeholder: "Hi Connor,\n\nI'm getting in touch about teaching, tutoring, or supervision...",
  },
  'Clinical / professional': {
    subject: 'Professional enquiry — connorconkeymorrison.com',
    placeholder: "Hi Connor,\n\nI'm reaching out regarding a clinical or professional matter...",
  },
  'General': {
    subject: 'General enquiry — connorconkeymorrison.com',
    placeholder: "Hi Connor,\n\n",
  }
};

function setType(type) {
  // Update active button
  document.querySelectorAll('.ccm-type-btn').forEach(btn => {
    btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.textContent.trim().replace('&', '/').replace(' & ', ' / ') === type || btn.getAttribute('onclick') === "setType('" + type + "')");
  });

  const t = templates[type];
  document.getElementById('ccm-subject').value = t.subject;
  document.getElementById('message').placeholder = t.placeholder;

  // Only pre-fill message if it's currently empty or was pre-filled
  const msg = document.getElementById('message');
  if (!msg.dataset.userEdited) {
    msg.value = '';
  }
}

function clearForm() {
  document.getElementById('contact-form').reset();
  document.getElementById('message').placeholder = 'Your message...';
  document.getElementById('message').removeAttribute('data-user-edited');
  document.getElementById('ccm-subject').value = 'Message from connorconkeymorrison.com';
  document.querySelectorAll('.ccm-type-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('ccm-status').textContent = '';
  document.getElementById('ccm-status').className = 'ccm-status';
}

// Track if user has manually edited the message
document.getElementById('message').addEventListener('input', function() {
  this.dataset.userEdited = 'true';
});

async function handleSubmit(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const btn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
  const status = document.getElementById('ccm-status');
  btn.textContent = 'Sending...';
  btn.disabled = true;
  status.textContent = '';
  status.className = 'ccm-status';

  const form = document.getElementById('contact-form');
  const data = new FormData(form);

  try {
    const res = await fetch('https://api.web3forms.com/submit', { method: 'POST', body: data });
    const result = await res.json();
    if (result.success) {
      status.textContent = 'Message sent — thanks!';
      status.className = 'ccm-status success';
      clearForm();
    } else {
      throw new Error();
    }
  } catch {
    status.textContent = 'Something went wrong. Try emailing directly.';
    status.className = 'ccm-status error';
  }

  btn.textContent = 'Send message';
  btn.disabled = false;
}

function copyEmail(btn) {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText('connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com').then(function() {
    btn.textContent = 'Copied!';
    btn.classList.add('copied');
    setTimeout(function() {
      btn.textContent = 'Copy address';
      btn.classList.remove('copied');
    }, 2000);
  });
}
</script>
```

:::

::: cv-placeholder
**Curriculum Vitae**

A downloadable CV will be available here shortly.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: profile-links-row
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333){.profile-link}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en){.profile-link}
[ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Connor-Conkey-Morrison){.profile-link}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/connorconkeymorrison){.profile-link}
[GitHub](https://github.com/ccicm){.profile-link}
:::
